M-APP.NAME: Flask App
M-APP.purpose: Flask web-server v3: DB-backed API + proxy for detail/log + background backfill
M-APP.depends: M-DB, M-SYNC, M-KEYS, M-STATIC, M-BACKFILL, M-ANOMALY, M-EMPLOYEE-REPORT

fn-config.PURPOSE: Auth config + keys from DB + sync status

fn-detail.PURPOSE: Proxy to generation detail — resolves token from DB

fn-log.PURPOSE: Proxy to generation log — resolves token from DB

fn-employee_list.PURPOSE: GET /api/employee-report/list — all employees with aggregated cost/tokens/requests

fn-employee_report.PURPOSE: GET /api/employee-report — single employee report with sessions, anomalies, heatmap

M-DB.NAME: Database Layer
M-DB.purpose: SQLAlchemy ORM: api_keys + generations + session_summaries tables in PostgreSQL

m-api_keys.PURPOSE: Registered API keys with sync metadata (last_sync_at, total_synced)

m-generations.PURPOSE: Cached generation records: includes session_id, device_id, source_key_name

m-session_summaries.PURPOSE: LLM summaries cache: session_id PK, source_key, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_cost

fn-summary_get_or_none.PURPOSE: Get summary by session_id, None if not cached

fn-summary_upsert.PURPOSE: INSERT or UPDATE summary for a session

fn-summary_list_by_key.PURPOSE: List summaries for employee in date range

M-SYNC.NAME: Sync Worker
M-SYNC.purpose: Background thread: incremental sync every 5 min from Polza.AI API to PostgreSQL. Enriches session_id/device_id from metadata.externalUserId on sync

fn-sync_key.PURPOSE: Sync single key — fetches only new records since last_sync_at

fn-upsert.PURPOSE: INSERT ON CONFLICT UPDATE — dedup by generation id

fn-enrich_session.PURPOSE: Parse metadata.externalUserId JSON → session_id + device_id for synced records

annotations.constraint-buffer: SYNC_BUFFER=2min overlap to catch boundary records

M-BACKFILL.NAME: Session Backfill
M-BACKFILL.purpose: Background thread: enrich session_id/device_id for historical records where session_id IS NULL. Server-side — survives page refresh

fn-worker.PURPOSE: _backfill_worker thread — processes batches of 50, handles errors, supports stop

fn-status.PURPOSE: GET /api/sessions/backfill/status — JSON: running, enriched, remaining, errorMsg, lastUpdate

annotations.constraint-error_pause: Auto-pauses if 45+ errors per batch (API rate limit)
annotations.constraint-batch_size: 50 records per batch, 0.5s delay between batches

M-KEYS.NAME: Key Parser
M-KEYS.purpose: Parse API keys from Excel (tab-separated), .env, free text

fn-parse_keys_text.PURPOSE: Parse Name\tKey format from Excel paste

M-STATIC.NAME: Frontend Assets
M-STATIC.purpose: SPA dashboard: table, charts, sidebar, detail modal, sessions view, backfill indicator — reads from DB

fn-state.PURPOSE: Global state management (S object) — includes sessions, sessionsLoading, expandedSession

fn-render.PURPOSE: Table, cards, pagination, charts, session cards rendering

fn-charts.PURPOSE: Chart.js analytics: timeline, models, cache, keys

fn-detail.PURPOSE: Modal with full log — backend resolves token

fn-sessions_view.PURPOSE: Session cards with expand, duration, cost, cache bar, models

fn-backfill_ui.PURPOSE: Topbar indicator: ⏳/✅/❌ status, polling every 2s, start/stop/retry buttons

fn-key_filter.PURPOSE: Dropdown filter by API key name

M-SUMMARY-STORE.NAME: Session Summary Store
M-SUMMARY-STORE.purpose: SQLAlchemy model + CRUD for session_summaries table — caches LLM summaries per session

m-session_summaries.PURPOSE: ORM model: session_id PK, source_key, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_cost, timestamps

fn-summary_get_or_none.PURPOSE: Get summary by session_id, return None if not cached

fn-summary_upsert.PURPOSE: INSERT or UPDATE summary for a session_id

fn-summary_list_by_key.PURPOSE: List summaries for an employee within date range

M-ANOMALY.NAME: Anomaly Detector
M-ANOMALY.purpose: Detect suspicious usage patterns: off-hours, weekends, unusual models, burst activity

fn-detect.PURPOSE: Analyze employee records, return anomaly list with type/severity/details

M-EMPLOYEE-REPORT.NAME: Employee Report API
M-EMPLOYEE-REPORT.purpose: Fast aggregated report per employee — pure SQL, no AI, instant response

fn-report_list.PURPOSE: GET /api/employee-report/list — summary: each employee with cost/tokens/requests

fn-report.PURPOSE: GET /api/employee-report — single employee: sessions, anomalies, heatmap, models

M-EMPLOYEE-UI.NAME: Employee Monitor UI
M-EMPLOYEE-UI.purpose: Frontend: employee list with costs, drill-down report with sessions, anomalies, heatmap

fn-load_employees.PURPOSE: Load employee list with aggregated costs for period

fn-render_employee_report.PURPOSE: Render full report: summary cards, anomalies, heatmap, models, sessions

fn-render_heatmap.PURPOSE: Render hourly activity heatmap grid (weekday x hour)

Constraints.constraint-sort: Polza.AI API supports only sortBy=createdAt|clientCost; DB supports all columns
Constraints.constraint-cache: cached_tokens in prompt_tokens_details = cache READ (hit); prompt_tokens - cached = cache WRITE (miss)
Constraints.constraint-sync: Sync every 5 min; incremental (only new records since last_sync_at - 2min buffer)
Constraints.constraint-token_resolv: Detail/log proxy resolves token from DB by source_key_name → api_keys.token
Constraints.constraint-threaded: Flask threaded=True required for non-blocking operation
Constraints.constraint-session_metadata: session_id/device_id from metadata.externalUserId JSON — only via detail API, NOT list API
Constraints.constraint-backfill_survives: Backfill runs in server thread — survives browser refresh, stoppable via API
Constraints.constraint-deploy: GitHub → git pull on VM → cp to /home/user/POLZA.AI/ → restart Flask
